chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.368 of 2018 Hassan Mehmood @ Mehmood Haravi Versus Parvaiz Haravi Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply at A 2. For orders on CMA 3113/18 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 3114/18 Dated: 30.01.2024 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed holds brief for M. Muhammad Imtiaz Khan for appellant. -.-.- Although Mr. Nadeem holds brief for learned counsel for the appellant and requests for adjournment on his behalf, the order sheet reflects that the indulgence could not be given. On the first date of hearing objections were raised about the appeal being barred by time and counsel for appellant undertook to satisfy the Court on the next date. On the following date i.e. 30.08.2021 he was called absent, followed by his absence on 29.08.2022, 09.10.2023 and so also today when his brief is held by Mr. Nadeem Ahmed. It seems that appellant and his counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
